content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于10月21日19:45(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年11月4日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、相位对弈
● 唤醒体「拉蒙娜」：「高效思维」获得的算力从 2 提高为 3。
● 命轮「灼热的吻别」：算力消耗从 2 提高为 3。
 
二、问题修复
● 修复了「唤醒」界面中，「无垢之芯」与「流明之芯」的快捷购买按钮缺失的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中，唤醒体「詹金」的技能「鼠群之王」效果描述缺失的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「菲茵特」的技能「异常引力」的描述语病问题，不影响实际效果。
● 修复了特遣纪录「故事的魔法」困难模式中，部分关卡内事件「制片人的迷思」缺失的问题。
● 修复了「冶炼室」界面中切换密契时词条属性文字会错误重叠的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「塔薇」的「通晓万物」有时候无法复制牌库顶「圣心」的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「卡斯托尔」的「黑羽」在星辰篇中达到 10 层「算力调和」后会错误继续触发「算力调和」的问题。
● 修复了命轮「扭曲的骑士诗」、「圣子尊容」附加的「心火」和「神焰」状态在配合部分卡牌多次生效效果时，额外的生效次数无法受到最终伤害、护盾加成的问题。
● 修复了「沉入殷红」、「群山的觉悟」抽取指令卡的效果能够抽取灵知觉醒的问题。
 
三、本地化
● 修正了命轮「苍白后裔」效果描述中施加中毒错误翻译为触发中毒的问题。
● 统一了战斗状态描述中卡牌类型「固有」的翻译，由 "Inherent" 更正为 "Innate"。
● 区分了卡牌效果「虚无」和相位对弈效果「空虚」的翻译，前者更正为 "Fleeting"，后者保持为 "Void"。
● 更正了战斗描述中「非衍生卡牌」的错误翻译，由 "Innate" 改为 "Non-Derived"。
● 移除了唤醒体「波吕克斯」技能界面中的多余空格。
● 修正了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「波吕克斯」的狂气爆发名称显示错误的问题。
● 统一了机器翻译剧情部分中部分角色的名字。
● 统一了部分密契套装随机获取道具中密契名的翻译。
● 统一了活动获取的纪念头像的描述格式。
● 优化了唤醒体「墨菲」的语音翻译。
● 人工翻译了档案馆中部分OST标题和曲名。

**V2.3.4.1 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on October 21 at 19:45(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on November 4, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Traphase
● Awakener "Ramona": The Arithmetica gained from "Efficient Thinking" increases from 2 to 3.
● Wheel of Destiny "Kiss of Farewell": Arithmetica cost increases from 2 to 3.

2. Problem Fix
● Fixed the issue of missing quick purchase buttons for "Pure Core" and "Luminous Core" in the "Awaken" interface.
● Fixed the issue of missing effect description for the skill "King of the Rat Swarm" of the Awakener "Jenkin" in "Traphase".
● Fixed the wording issue in the description of the skill "Anomalous Gravity" for the Awakener "Faint" in "Traphase," which does not affect the actual effect.
● Fixed the issue where the event "Producer's Myth" was missing in some levels of the Special Ops "The Magic of Stories" hard mode.
● Fixed the issue where the attribute text would incorrectly overlap when switching Covenants in the Alchemy interface.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Tawil's" "Omniscience" sometimes could not copy the top card of the deck "Sacred Heart."
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Castor" would incorrectly continue to trigger "Arithmetica Harmony" after reaching 10 levels of "Arithmetica Harmony" with the "Onyx Plume" in Astral Reign.
● Fixed an issue where the additional activation times of the states "Alight" and "Ablaze" attached to the Wheels of Destiny "Twisted Knight Ballad" and "The Divu's Visage" could not benefit from Final DMG and Shield bonuses when combined with multiple activation effects of certain cards.
● Fixed the issue where the effects of drawing command cards for "Drowning in Crimson" and "The Mountains' Resolve" could draw Rouse.

3.Localization
● Fixed the missing quick purchase buttons for "Pure Core" and "Luminous Core" in the "Awaken" interface.
● Fixed the missing effect description for the skill "King of the Rat Swarm" of the Awakener "Jenkin" in "Traphase" mode.
● Fixed the issue where the Event "Producer's Myth" was missing in some stages of the Special Ops "The Magic of Stories" hard mode.
● English Localization Fixes:
● Fixed the incorrect description of the Wheel of Destiny "Pale Descendant" effect. The text now correctly states it "applies" Poison instead of "triggers" Poison.
● Corrected the translation of "固有" in certain battle state descriptions from "Inherent" to the proper term, "Innate".
● Fixed the identical translations for "空虚" (Traphase effect) and "虚无" (Card effect). "虚无" is now translated as "Fleeting," while "空虚" remains "Void".
● Corrected the translation of "非衍生指令卡" in certain battle descriptions from "Innate" to "Non-Derived".
● Removed extra spaces in the Awakener "Pollux's" skill interface.
● Fixed the issue where Pollux's Exalt skill name was incorrectly displayed in Traphase mode.
● Fixed inconsistent name translations within machine-translated story text. We are working to complete human translation for all story content as soon as possible.
● Standardized the description format for commemorative avatars obtained from events.
● Fixed a mistranslation issue in the voice line translation of the Awakener "Murphy".
● OST titles and song names in the Archive have been human translated.
